title: 「Neither...nor...」句型
titleEn: Using Neither...nor... to make both alternatives negative

omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Neither + Subject A + nor + Subject B + verb + other information

formulas.formula: Neither + Subject A + nor + Subject B + verb + other information

formulas.labelZh: Pattern 2：連接受詞、形容詞或其他平行成分
formulas.formula: Subject + verb + neither + A + nor + B
Subject + auxiliary verb + neither + verb phrase A + nor + verb phrase B

example: Neither the manager nor the employees were happy with the new policy.
exampleZh: 經理和員工都不滿意這項新政策。

examples.en: Neither the manager nor the employees were happy with the new policy.
examples.zh: 經理和員工都不滿意這項新政策。
examples.highlight: Neither the manager nor the employees

examples.en: He speaks neither English nor French.
examples.zh: 他既不會說英文，也不會說法文。

examples.en: She has neither called me nor sent me a message.
examples.zh: 她既沒有致電給我，也沒有傳訊息給我。
examples.highlight: neither called me nor sent me a message

meaning.zh: Neither A nor B 明確表示 A 不成立，B 也不成立。

rules.zh: Neither...nor... 已表示兩項都是否定，不要在句中再加入另一個否定詞。
rules.en: Neither...nor... already makes both items negative, so do not add another negative word.
examples: The shop accepts neither cash nor cheques.

rules.zh: Neither 和 nor 後面的 A 和 B 必須保持相同的文法形式。
rules.en: The elements after neither and nor must use matching grammatical forms.
examples: She likes neither singing nor dancing.
She wants neither to sing nor to dance.

rules.zh: 連接兩個主詞時，動詞通常配合較接近動詞的主詞，稱為就近一致。
rules.en: When joining two subjects, the verb normally agrees with the nearer subject.
examples: Neither the manager nor the employees were ready.
Neither the employees nor the manager was ready.

rules.zh: 連接兩個動作時，助動詞通常只需出現一次，避免不必要的重複。
rules.en: When joining two actions, the auxiliary normally appears only once, avoiding unnecessary repetition.
examples: She has neither called me nor sent a message.
The machine can neither print in colour nor scan documents.

rules.zh: Neither A nor B 明確表示 A 和 B 都不成立，不等於較含糊的 not both A and B。
rules.en: Neither A nor B clearly means that both A and B are false; it is not equivalent to the less specific not both A and B.
examples: Neither Tom nor Amy attended the meeting.

benefits.zh: 可以把兩項否定資料清楚合併，不需要重複兩個完整否定句。
benefits.en: It combines two negative ideas clearly without repeating two complete negative sentences.

benefits.zh: 提供 does not、is not、cannot 和 did not 以外的自然表達方法，避免重複 not。
benefits.en: It offers a natural alternative to repeatedly using does not, is not, cannot or did not.

benefits.zh: 能準確指出哪兩個選項都不成立。
benefits.en: It identifies exactly which two alternatives are both excluded.

benefits.zh: Neither 和 nor 把兩項相同形式的資料並列，令句子更平衡、更容易理解。
benefits.en: Neither and nor place matching information in parallel, creating a more balanced and readable sentence.

benefits.zh: 這個句型適合在說話、作文和報告中否定兩個人物、選擇、特點、行動或結果。
benefits.en: The structure is useful in speaking, essays and reports for rejecting two people, choices, qualities, actions or results.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Preserve the original meaning and tense.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 neither...nor... 改寫以下句子。
答案必須保留原句的意思和時態。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Mia does not like tea, and she does not like coffee.
questions.promptZh: 米婭不喜歡茶，也不喜歡咖啡。
questions.answer: Mia likes neither tea nor coffee.
questions.answerZh: 米婭既不喜歡茶，也不喜歡咖啡。
questions.highlight: Mia likes neither tea nor coffee.

questions.prompt: Ben is not at home. Leo is not at home either.
questions.promptZh: 本不在家。里奧也不在家。
questions.answer: Neither Ben nor Leo is at home.
questions.answerZh: 本和里奧都不在家。
questions.highlight: Neither Ben nor Leo is at home.

questions.prompt: The bag is not heavy, and it is not expensive.
questions.promptZh: 這個袋子不重，也不昂貴。
questions.answer: The bag is neither heavy nor expensive.
questions.answerZh: 這個袋子既不重，也不昂貴。
questions.highlight: The bag is neither heavy nor expensive.

questions.prompt: Lily cannot swim. She cannot ride a bicycle either.
questions.promptZh: 莉莉不會游泳，也不會踏單車。

questions.answerZh: 莉莉既不會游泳，也不會踏單車。
questions.highlight: Lily can neither swim nor ride a bicycle.

questions.prompt: We did not visit the museum, and we did not visit the zoo.
questions.promptZh: 我們沒有參觀博物館，也沒有參觀動物園。
questions.answer: We visited neither the museum nor the zoo.
questions.answerZh: 我們既沒有參觀博物館，也沒有參觀動物園。

questions.prompt: The teacher was not ready. The students were not ready either.

questions.highlight: Neither the teacher nor the students were ready.

questions.prompt: Anna is not hungry, and Tom is not hungry.

questions.answer: Emma bought neither the red dress nor the blue dress.

questions.prompt: Daniel is not interested in football or basketball.

questions.answer: The charity received neither the funding it expected nor the volunteers it needed.

questions.prompt: The manager did not confirm when the office would reopen. He did not explain how staff should work in the meantime either.
questions.promptZh: 經理沒有確認辦公室何時重開，也沒有解釋員工在此期間應如何工作。
questions.answer: The manager neither confirmed when the office would reopen nor explained how staff should work in the meantime.
questions.answerZh: 經理既沒有確認辦公室何時重開，也沒有解釋員工在此期間應如何工作。
questions.highlight: The manager neither confirmed when the office would reopen nor explained how staff should work in the meantime.

questions.prompt: Stricter rules alone cannot completely prevent human error. Additional training alone cannot completely prevent human error either.
questions.promptZh: 單靠更嚴格的規則不能完全防止人為錯誤，單靠額外培訓也不能完全防止人為錯誤。
questions.answer: Neither stricter rules alone nor additional training alone can completely prevent human error.
questions.answerZh: 單靠更嚴格的規則或額外培訓，都不能完全防止人為錯誤。
questions.highlight: Neither stricter rules alone nor additional training alone can completely prevent human error.
